problem id: e4835530
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01100000 -> 00110000
  01111001 -> 11110100
  11000110 -> 01010011
  00001011 -> 01011101
  10001000 -> 00000100
  00001101 -> 01101110
  00101111 -> 01101111
  10010100 -> 11101010

query: 11000101
predicted answer: 01001010
